title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Stryker India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!
